overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a dimly lit wooden industrial mine structure. The character passes an NPC worker shoveling near steam-powered conveyor machinery, continues along elevated wooden walkways with hanging lamps, and approaches an exit door. The environment features warm artificial lighting against dark wooden textures.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden industrial platform with steam-powered conveyor machinery

events.description: character begins walking forward from the doorway into the industrial structure
steam from machinery temporarily obscures the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden platform past industrial machinery and steam vents

notable_agents.action: working with shovel near the conveyor belt machinery, moving gravel material

entered.detail: wooden door with metal handle at the starting point
wooden conveyor structure with gravel and rising steam
single incandescent bulb hanging from ceiling
rough wooden safety railings along the walkway edge
white steam rising from the machinery

segments.scene_description: The character exits a wooden door into a narrow industrial platform. Steam rises from conveyor machinery in the center while an NPC worker shovels material on the left. Warm lamplight illuminates the wooden walkways and railings as the character moves forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden corridor with overhead lighting

events.description: exiting the machinery area into the main wooden corridor
passing under a brighter hanging lamp illuminating the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated wooden walkway through the dimly lit corridor

entered.detail: white sign with text mounted on the wooden wall
wooden barrel container along the railing

segments.scene_description: Moving beyond the machinery area, the character walks through a narrow wooden corridor illuminated by hanging lamps. A sign is visible on the right wall, and wooden barrels line the railing. The steam and conveyor equipment fall behind as the path continues forward through the industrial structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower wooden platform with industrial storage

events.description: descending short wooden stairs to lower platform level
approaching the illuminated exit door at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down wooden stairs and approaching the exit door at the end of the structure

entered.detail: wooden door with illuminated EXIT sign above it
wooden crate or box on the platform floor

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a lower wooden platform where large metal storage tanks stand on the right. Continuing forward, the character approaches a wooden door marked with an illuminated EXIT sign, indicating the end of the industrial walkway. Wooden crates and industrial equipment line the final approach to the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial mine, transitioning from a steam-filled machinery hub to a quiet exit corridor. It begins as the character steps through a wooden door onto a narrow platform where steam rises from conveyor machinery and a worker shovels material under warm lamplight. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into a narrow wooden corridor lined with barrels and hanging lamps, leaving the noise of the equipment behind. The path then descends to a lower platform featuring large metal storage tanks and scattered crates before finally turning toward a wooden door marked with an illuminated exit sign.
